japan.title: Comprehensive Japan Tourist Visa Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Citizens
japan.description: The definitive 2026 guide for Japan visa applications in Bangladesh. Covering JVAC (VFS Global) submission, mandatory QR-code forms, updated financial thresholds, and seasonal processing alerts.

processing_time_metrics.peak_season_delay: 15-20 working days (During Sakura & Autumn Leaf seasons)
processing_time_metrics.embassy_review_phase: Minimum 4 working days after JVAC submission
processing_time_metrics.express_service: Unavailable (Japan Embassy does not offer fast-track for tourist visas)
processing_time_metrics.notes: Processing time excludes weekends and public holidays (both Bangladesh and Japan Embassy holidays).

visa_fee_structure_2026.payment_policy: Non-refundable. Cash or POS (Debit/Credit Card) accepted at JVAC.

stay_and_validity_rules.extended_stay: Up to 90 days (Requires strong justification/financial proof)
stay_and_validity_rules.overstay_penalty: Immediate deportation and minimum 5-year re-entry ban
stay_and_validity_rules.extension_possibility: Generally not allowed once inside Japan for tourist status.

technical_photo_specifications.facial_metrics: Head height must be 32mm to 36mm from chin to crown
strict_donots: No staples or paperclips (must be glued)
No heavy facial retouching/filters
No white clothing (must contrast with background)
No tinted lenses or thick frames

primary_documents: Original Passport (Valid for 6+ months from entry, 2+ blank pages)
Old Passports (Mandatory if any previous visas were issued)
Application Form with QR Code (typed, not handwritten for 2026 standards)
Visa Request/Cover Letter (Must state specific travel dates and purpose)
Travel Itinerary (Detailed daily plan with addresses of accommodations and activities)
Trade License (English translation + Notary), Company Bank Statement ,Membership of Chamber/Association
Original NOC letter from the company
Ticket reservation (PNR) for round-trip flights
Hotel reservation
financial_proofs: Personal Bank Statement (Last 6 months, original, seal on every page)
Bank Solvency Certificate (Must mention current balance in BDT/USD)
ITDR (Income Tax Deposit Receipt) / Tax Return Certificate for last 3 years
logistics_proofs: Detailed 'Schedule of Stay' (Form provided by Embassy)
Confirmed Flight Itinerary (PNR required; actual ticket purchase not advised)
Hotel Reservations (Matching the Schedule of Stay exactly)

financial_thresholds_2026.logic: Calculated at ~JPY 20,000 per day of stay plus flight costs.
financial_thresholds_2026.warning: Avoid 'Credit' entries of large sums right before application (Lump-sum deposits).

geospatial_submission_data.address: Borak Mehnur, 8th Floor, 51/B Kemal Ataturk Avenue, Banani, Dhaka-1213
4th Floor, Nirvana Inn, Mirza Jungle Road, Sylhet-3100

itinerary_design_strategy.requirements: Every night must be accounted for. Night buses count as accommodation but must be stated.

rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation: Provide a 'Letter of Explanation' for any irregularities in documentation.

expert_approval_hacks: Use high-quality Matte paper for photos to avoid glare.
Submit your 'Tax Return' even if not asked; it proves social responsibility.
Ensure the cover letter is signed in BLUE ink (originality proof).
Keep at least 25% more funds than the estimated trip cost.

additional_logistics_2026.visit_japan_web: Mandatory online registration for Immigration/Customs before landing.
additional_logistics_2026.currency_advice: Japan remains cash-heavy; carry JPY 50,000 in cash upon arrival.
additional_logistics_2026.jr_pass_note: Purchase online before travel if doing multi-city trips; 2026 prices are significantly higher.

youtube_video_options.video_title: Japan Visitor Visa 2026: Avoiding Common Rejections
Step-by-Step Japan Visa Application from Bangladesh
How to Write a Perfect Cover Letter for Japan Visa

faq_extended.question: Does Japan require a physical interview?
faq_extended.answer: Rarely. In 2026, 98% of cases are decided based on the document file alone.

faq_extended.question: Is a sponsor allowed?
faq_extended.answer: Yes, but first-degree relatives (Parents/Siblings/Spouse) are preferred. Third-party sponsors are often scrutinized.

faq_extended.question: Can I apply for a 5-year Multiple Entry Visa?
faq_extended.answer: Only if you have visited Japan/G7 countries previously and have high-income tax records.

united-kingdom.title: Comprehensive UK Standard Visitor Visa Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Citizens
united-kingdom.description: The definitive 2026 guide for UK visa applications in Bangladesh. Detailing the online GOV.UK application, VFS Global biometric submission, and stringent financial documentation standards.

visa_category_details.eligibility: Holders of valid Bangladeshi Ordinary Passports with intent to leave the UK

processing_time_metrics.super_priority_service: Next working day (Available in Dhaka only)
processing_time_metrics.notes: Processing starts after biometric enrollment at VFS Global.

visa_fee_structure_2026.payment_policy: Visa fees must be paid online via Credit/Debit card during application.

stay_and_validity_rules.visa_validity_window: Varies by fee paid (6 months to 10 years)
stay_and_validity_rules.rule_of_thumb: Must not live in the UK through successive visits
stay_and_validity_rules.overstay_penalty: Mandatory 1 to 10-year ban on all UK visa types
stay_and_validity_rules.extension_possibility: Extremely rare; only for emergency medical or life-threatening situations.

technical_photo_specifications.background_color: Cream or Light Grey (Plain White is acceptable but less preferred)
technical_photo_specifications.print_quality: High resolution (Photo is scanned at VFS; physical copies usually returned)
technical_photo_specifications.facial_metrics: Neutral expression, mouth closed, eyes looking directly at camera
strict_donots: No head coverings (unless for religious/medical reasons)
No glasses (unless medically necessary; eyes must be clearly visible)
No shadows on face or background
Must be taken within the last 1 month

primary_documents: Original Passport (Valid for duration of stay)
All Previous Passports (To show travel history/compliance)
Printed Appointment Confirmation from VFS
UKVI Checklist (Generated after online payment)
financial_proofs: Personal Bank Statement (Last 6 months, showing stable income flow)
Bank Solvency Certificate (Original with bank manager contact details)
Income Tax Certificate (IT10B) and Return Acknowledgement Receipts
Fixed Deposit (FDR) / Savings Bonds (as supporting assets only)
logistics_proofs: Detailed Cover Letter (Outline of trip, reason for visit, ties to Bangladesh)
Hotel Bookings (Provisional; non-refundable not required)
Flight Reservation (PNR only; do not purchase tickets until visa is issued)

financial_thresholds_2026.logic: UKVI looks for 'Disposable Income' vs 'Trip Cost'. Funds should be 3x the estimated trip cost.
financial_thresholds_2026.warning: Sudden large deposits ('Funds Parking') are the #1 cause of rejection.

geospatial_submission_data.address: Nafi Tower, 53, Gulshan Avenue, Gulshan-1, Dhaka-1212
7th Floor, Rose View Hotel, Shahjalal Upashahar, Sylhet

itinerary_design_strategy.popular_routes: London (4 days) -> Oxford (1 day) -> Edinburgh (2 days)
itinerary_design_strategy.requirements: The 'VFR' (Visiting Friends/Relatives) route requires an Invitation Letter and the host's UK passport/visa copy.

high_risk: Disproportionate trip cost vs monthly income
rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation: Focus heavily on proving 'Economic Ties' (property, family, business) to ensure return.

expert_approval_hacks: Upload documents digitally via the VFS portal before your appointment to save time.
Include property deeds or valuation reports to prove strong home ties.
If business-owner, include the company's membership certificate (FBCCI/Chamber).
Explain any large bank transfers in a separate 'Source of Funds' letter.

additional_logistics_2026.tb_test: Mandatory only for stays longer than 6 months (Students/Work).
additional_logistics_2026.biometric_enrollment: Digital fingerprints and facial scan are mandatory for every application.
additional_logistics_2026.e_visa_transition: UK is moving to eVisas; check your 'UKVI Account' for digital status updates.

Step-by-Step UK Visa Application from Bangladesh
How to Write a Perfect Cover Letter for UK Visa

faq_extended.question: Can I use a sponsor for a UK Tourist Visa?
faq_extended.answer: Yes, but you must still prove why YOU will return to Bangladesh. The sponsor's wealth does not replace your ties to home.

faq_extended.question: How far in advance can I apply?
faq_extended.answer: Maximum 3 months before your intended travel date.

faq_extended.question: Is insurance mandatory?
faq_extended.answer: Not legally required for the visa, but highly recommended as NHS costs for visitors are extremely high.

united-states.title: Comprehensive USA B1/B2 Visitor Visa Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Citizens
united-states.description: The definitive 2026 guide for US visa applications in Bangladesh. Featuring the new mandatory Visa Bond protocol (Jan 2026), DS-160 navigation, and the latest Dhaka-specific interview wait times.

visa_category_details.eligibility: Applicants must demonstrate strong social/economic ties to Bangladesh to overcome Section 214(b) presumption of immigrant intent.

processing_time_metrics.appointment_wait_time: 6 - 12 months (Highly variable; check CGI Federal daily for slots)
processing_time_metrics.administrative_processing: 4 - 8 weeks (If your case requires '221(g)' additional review)
processing_time_metrics.express_service: Emergency appointments available for life-threatening medical needs or funerals.
processing_time_metrics.notes: Wait times are for the interview date itself; the visa is typically printed within a week of the interview.

visa_fee_structure_2026.embassy_visa_fee: USD 185 (Payable in BDT at Eastern Bank Limited - approx. BDT 21,500 - 23,000)
visa_fee_structure_2026.mandatory_visa_bond_2026: USD 5,000 - 15,000 (New Requirement: Only if instructed by the Consular Officer post-interview)

optional_vfs_delivery.document_pickup: Free at designated locations (Dhaka, Chittagong, Sylhet)

visa_fee_structure_2026.payment_policy: MRV fee is non-refundable and valid for 365 days. Visa Bond is refundable upon verified return to Bangladesh.

stay_and_validity_rules.standard_stay: Up to 180 days (Determined by CBP officer at the US Port of Entry, not the visa)
stay_and_validity_rules.visa_validity_window: Typically 5 years for Bangladeshi citizens (Multiple entry)
stay_and_validity_rules.overstay_penalty: Immediate cancellation of visa, deportation, and likely permanent ban from the US.
stay_and_validity_rules.extension_possibility: Possible via Form I-539 while inside the US (Must file 45 days before expiry).

technical_photo_specifications.standard: US Department of State Biometric Standard
technical_photo_specifications.print_quality: High resolution; digital file must be square (min 600x600 pixels)
technical_photo_specifications.facial_metrics: Head must be between 1 - 1 3/8 inches (25 - 35 mm) from chin to crown
strict_donots: NO EYEGLASSES (Strictly prohibited unless for rare medical surgery cases)
No uniforms (Religious attire like Hijab is okay if it doesn't obscure the face)
No digital retouching or background removal tools
Neutral expression with eyes open

primary_documents: Current Passport (Valid for 6+ months)
All Old Passports (Crucial for showing travel history)
DS-160 Confirmation Page (Barcoded)
Appointment Confirmation Page
financial_proofs: Personal Bank Statements (Last 6-12 months, original with seal)
Income Tax Return (IT-10B) and Tax Certificates for 3 years
Evidence of Assets (Land deeds, share profiles, or FDRs as secondary proof)
logistics_proofs: Brief Trip Itinerary (Daily plan is good but don't over-rehearse)
Letter of Invitation (If visiting family/friends; include their US status copy)
NO PRE-PAID FLIGHTS (US Embassy explicitly advises against buying tickets before approval)

financial_thresholds_2026.logic: The US looks for 'Stability' rather than a high balance. They want to see that your income allows for a US trip without depleting your life savings.
financial_thresholds_2026.warning: Lump-sum deposits without a clear source of funds will lead to an immediate 214(b) rejection.

geospatial_submission_data.address: Madani Avenue, Baridhara, Dhaka-1212
geospatial_submission_data.security_note: No electronics (phones/laptops) or large bags allowed inside.

itinerary_design_strategy.classic_tourism: East Coast (NYC, DC, Niagara) or West Coast (SF, LA, Vegas)
itinerary_design_strategy.requirements: The interview is more important than the itinerary. Be ready to explain exactly WHY you chose these cities and how you will pay for them.

high_risk: Single young adults with no property/business
Family already living in the US (overstay risk)
medium_risk: No previous international travel to 'strong' countries (UK/Schengen/Japan)
rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation: Honesty in the DS-160. Do not hide family members in the US; they already know.

expert_approval_hacks: The visa is won or lost in the DS-160 form; ensure every detail is 100% accurate.
During the interview: Keep answers short (1-2 sentences). Speak clearly and maintain eye contact.
Do not provide documents unless the officer specifically asks for them.
If applying as a business owner, bring your original Trade License.

additional_logistics_2026.visa_bond_rule: As of Jan 21, 2026, be prepared for a potential refundable bond of up to $15k if requested.
additional_logistics_2026.evus_requirement: Only for 10-year B1/B2 visas (currently mainly for China passport holders, check for BD updates).
additional_logistics_2026.interview_waiver: Available for those renewing a visa that expired within the last 48 months (Drop-box).

faq_extended.question: Can I bring my phone to the Embassy?
faq_extended.answer: No. Small lockers are available outside for a fee, but it's better to leave electronics with a driver or at home.

faq_extended.question: Does a rejection from another country affect my US visa?
faq_extended.answer: Yes. You must disclose it. Hiding it is considered fraud and leads to a permanent ban.

faq_extended.question: Is insurance required?
faq_extended.answer: Not for the visa, but US healthcare is extremely expensive; travel insurance is highly recommended.

canada.title: Comprehensive Canada Tourist Visa Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Citizens
canada.description: The definitive 2026 guide for Canada Temporary Resident Visa (TRV) applications in Bangladesh. Covering IRCC online submission, Biometric instructions at VFS Global, and updated financial solvency guidelines.

visa_category_details.eligibility: Holders of valid Bangladeshi Ordinary Passports

processing_time_metrics.embassy_review_phase: Varies by IRCC global workload; processing begins after Biometrics
processing_time_metrics.express_service: Unavailable (CAN+ program exists but is not a paid express service)
processing_time_metrics.notes: Processing time fluctuates significantly based on the volume of applications at the Singapore or Colombo hubs.

visa_fee_structure_2026.payment_policy: Online payment via Credit/Debit card for IRCC fees. VFS fees paid at center.

stay_and_validity_rules.extended_stay: Possible via 'Visitor Record' application inside Canada
stay_and_validity_rules.visa_validity_window: Up to 10 years or until Passport Expiry
stay_and_validity_rules.overstay_penalty: Removal order, potential 1-year ban, and future visa denials
stay_and_validity_rules.extension_possibility: Allowed if applied 30 days before current status expires.

technical_photo_specifications.print_quality: Professional lab print, Matte finish required
technical_photo_specifications.facial_metrics: Head height must be 31mm to 36mm from chin to crown
strict_donots: No digital alterations or background removal
No smiling (must have a neutral expression)
No white clothing (must contrast with background)
No eyewear that obscures eyes or creates glare

primary_documents: Original Passport (Valid for duration of stay, recommended 1 year+)
Scanned copies of all previous passports (Visas and entry/exit stamps)
Digital Application Form (IMM 5257) & Family Information (IMM 5645)
Purpose of Travel Statement (Cover letter detailing roots in Bangladesh)
Invitation Letter (Required if visiting family/friends; must include inviter's PR/Citizenship status)
financial_proofs: Personal Bank Statement (Last 6 months, original with bank seal)
Bank Solvency Certificate (Mentioning balance in BDT and CAD equivalent)
Income Tax Returns (ITR) / Acknowledgement Slips for the last 3 years
logistics_proofs: Detailed Day-to-Day Itinerary (Matching the flight and hotel dates)
Flight Reservation (Confirmed PNR; actual ticket purchase not required)
Hotel Booking Confirmation (Covering the entire duration of the stay)

corporate_employees: NOC with joining date and salary

financial_thresholds_2026.logic: Calculated at ~CAD 250 per day plus round-trip airfare and internal travel.
financial_thresholds_2026.warning: Sudden large deposits (Lump-sum) without source documents lead to 'Financial Misrepresentation' refusals.

geospatial_submission_data.address: Delta Life Tower, 4th Floor, Plot No. 37, Road No. 90, Gulshan 2, Dhaka-1212
7th Floor, Nirvana Inn, Mirza Jungle Road, Sylhet-3100

itinerary_design_strategy.golden_route: Toronto -> Niagara Falls -> Ottawa -> Montreal -> Quebec City
itinerary_design_strategy.requirements: Itinerary must align with the funds shown. Internal flights/trains (VIA Rail) should be mentioned.

medium_risk: No previous history of travel to Tier-1 countries
rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation: Include Asset Valuation (Land/Flat) and strong family ties documentation (Marriage/Birth certificates).

expert_approval_hacks: Upload a 'Letter of Explanation' even if optional; it's the only way to 'speak' to the officer.
Ensure all Bengali documents are translated by an authorized translator and notarized.
Keep digital scans under 4MB per file as per IRCC portal limits.
Apply at least 4 months in advance to account for seasonal backlog.

additional_logistics_2026.visit_japan_web: N/A (Canada uses ArriveCAN for specific declarations, though mostly optional now).
additional_logistics_2026.currency_advice: Canada is very card-friendly; use a multi-currency travel card for 90% of transactions.
additional_logistics_2026.jr_pass_note: Consider a VIA Rail pass if traveling between Toronto and Montreal; book 3 months early for 'Escape' fares.

faq_extended.question: Does Canada require a physical interview?
faq_extended.answer: Almost never for visitor visas. Decisions are based entirely on the digital application and biometrics.

faq_extended.question: Is a sponsor allowed?
faq_extended.answer: Yes, but they must provide 'Notice of Assessment' (NOA) and T4 slips to prove financial capability in Canada.

faq_extended.question: Can I apply for a 10-year Multiple Entry Visa?
faq_extended.answer: IRCC automatically considers most applicants for a multiple-entry visa valid until passport expiry.

albania.title: Comprehensive Albania Tourist e-Visa Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Citizens
albania.description: The definitive 2026 guide for Albania e-visa applications for Bangladeshi nationals. Covering the e-Albania portal submission, digitized document requirements, financial solvency standards, and Balkan entry protocols.

processing_time_metrics.embassy_review_phase: Minimum 15 working days after digital fee confirmation
processing_time_metrics.express_service: Available via third-party rush options (18-22 days), but standard gov processing remains fixed
processing_time_metrics.notes: Processing starts only after the payment status is verified in the e-Visa system. Weekends in Albania (Sat-Sun) are excluded.

visa_fee_structure_2026.embassy_visa_fee: EUR 50 (Approx. BDT 6,200 - 6,500 based on exchange rates)
visa_fee_structure_2026.vfs_service_charge: N/A (Process is primarily online/direct via e-visa portal)
visa_fee_structure_2026.payment_policy: Non-refundable. Paid via International Credit/Debit card or Bank Transfer as specified on the e-Albania portal.

stay_and_validity_rules.standard_stay: Up to 90 days within a 180-day period
stay_and_validity_rules.extended_stay: Rarely granted for tourism; requires conversion to a Type D long-stay visa
stay_and_validity_rules.overstay_penalty: Fines starting from EUR 500 and potential multi-year ban from the Schengen/Balkan area
stay_and_validity_rules.extension_possibility: Must apply at the Regional Directorate for Border and Migration 15 days before expiry.

technical_photo_specifications.standard: ICAO Compliant / Albanian Ministry of Interior Standard
technical_photo_specifications.print_quality: Digital upload must be 600dpi; file size under 240kB
technical_photo_specifications.facial_metrics: Face must occupy 70-80% of the frame; head height ~34.5mm
strict_donots: No white clothing (must contrast with the background)
No glasses (even if prescription, unless medically essential with proof)
No shadows on the face or background
No headgear except for religious purposes (full face must be visible)

primary_documents: Original Passport (Valid for 3+ months beyond stay, 2+ blank pages)
Digital Scan of Passport Bio-page
Completed e-Visa Application Form (Submitted via e-visa.al)
Cover Letter signed by the applicant detailing travel purpose
Detailed Itinerary including all internal city transfers
Proof of Employment (NOC or Trade License for business owners)
Round-trip Flight Reservation (Confirmed PNR)
Confirmed Hotel Accommodation for the entire duration
financial_proofs: Personal Bank Statement (Last 12 months, original with bank seal)
Proof of sufficient funds (Minimum EUR 50/day for adults)
Income Tax Return (ITR) certificates for the last 3 years
Salary Slips for the last 3-6 months (for employees)
logistics_proofs: Travel Health Insurance (Minimum coverage EUR 30,000)
Civil Status Certificate (Marriage certificate/Birth certificate if traveling with family)
Host's Invitation Letter (If staying with a resident, notarized in Albania)

entrepreneurs: Trade License with English Translation & Notary

financial_thresholds_2026.logic: Calculated at ~EUR 50 per day plus flight/accommodation buffers.
financial_thresholds_2026.warning: Sudden large deposits without verifiable sources will trigger immediate rejection.

geospatial_submission_data.address: https://e-visa.al
Various locations in Gulshan/Banani

itinerary_design_strategy.requirements: Hotel bookings must match the dates on the flight itinerary exactly.

medium_risk: Single entry with no prior travel history to Europe
rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation: Ensure all documents are uploaded in high-quality PDF format; blurry scans lead to instant refusal.

expert_approval_hacks: Upload a 'Letter of Intent' explaining why you chose Albania over other destinations.
Ensure your Trade License is translated by a certified translator (Notary alone isn't enough).
Keep the bank balance consistent—do not withdraw large amounts during the 15-day processing window.
Submit a copy of any valid/expired US, UK, or Schengen visas to significantly boost approval chances.

additional_logistics_2026.visit_japan_web: N/A - Albania uses the Digital Entry Form for health/security checks (if active).
additional_logistics_2026.currency_advice: Local currency is Albanian LEK (ALL). Carry Euros (EUR) for easy exchange.
additional_logistics_2026.jr_pass_note: No rail pass exists; long-distance travel is best done by 'Furgon' (minibuses) or car rental.

faq_extended.question: Does Albania require a physical interview?
faq_extended.answer: Generally no for the e-visa. However, the Ministry may request an interview at a nearby embassy in rare cases.

faq_extended.question: Can I enter Albania with a Schengen Visa?
faq_extended.answer: Yes, if you hold a valid, multiple-entry Schengen, US, UK, or Irish visa and have used it at least once to enter that territory.

faq_extended.question: Is the visa fee refundable?
faq_extended.answer: No, once the application is submitted to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, the fee is forfeited regardless of the result.

european-union.title: Comprehensive Schengen (Europe) Tourist Visa Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Citizens
european-union.description: The definitive 2026 guide for Schengen visa applications covering 29 European nations. Detailed protocols for VFS Global/BLS submissions, EES registration updates, financial solvency, and multi-country travel planning.

visa_category_details.visa_type: Tourist Visa (Single, Double, or Multiple Entry)

processing_time_metrics.peak_season_delay: 30-45 working days (During Summer and Christmas periods)
processing_time_metrics.embassy_review_phase: Minimum 15 working days after biometric enrollment
processing_time_metrics.express_service: Unavailable (Member states process based on chronological order and merit)
processing_time_metrics.notes: Applications can be submitted up to 6 months in advance. Early submission is highly recommended for Bangladeshi nationals.

visa_fee_structure_2026.embassy_visa_fee: EUR 90 (Approx. BDT 11,500 - 12,000 based on exchange rates)
visa_fee_structure_2026.vfs_service_charge: BDT 3,500 - 5,500 (Varies by specific mission like Italy, France, or Germany)
visa_fee_structure_2026.payment_policy: Non-refundable. Embassy fees are usually paid via Bank Draft or Cash; Service charges are paid at the VFS/BLS center.

stay_and_validity_rules.extended_stay: Requires National Visa (Type D) for stays exceeding 90 days
stay_and_validity_rules.visa_validity_window: Varies from travel dates to 5 years (Based on travel history)
stay_and_validity_rules.overstay_penalty: Immediate detention, deportation, and a 5-year SIS (Schengen Information System) ban
stay_and_validity_rules.extension_possibility: Only in cases of Force Majeure or humanitarian reasons.

technical_photo_specifications.print_quality: High resolution, no ink marks or creases
technical_photo_specifications.facial_metrics: Head must be centered, occupying 70-80% of the photo
strict_donots: No headgear except for religious reasons
No uniforms or white clothing
No 'Red Eye' or heavy facial retouching
No hair covering the eyes or face

primary_documents: Original Passport (Valid for 3+ months after return, 2+ blank pages)
Completed and Signed Schengen Visa Application Form
Cover Letter stating purpose of visit and detailed itinerary
Original NOC from employer or Trade License (English + Notary)
Round-trip Flight Reservation (Confirmed PNR)
Proof of Accommodation (Hotel bookings for every night in Schengen area)
Marriage Certificate / Birth Certificate (If traveling with family)
financial_proofs: Personal Bank Statement (Last 6 months, original with bank seal)
Bank Solvency Certificate
Income Tax Return (ITR) / Tax Certificate for last 3 years
Salary Slips for the last 6 months
logistics_proofs: Travel Insurance (Minimum EUR 30,000 coverage, valid for all Schengen states)
Internal travel proof (Train/Flight tickets between European cities)
Copies of all previous visas and entry/exit stamps

entrepreneurs: Trade License with English Translation & Notary

financial_thresholds_2026.logic: Calculated based on ~EUR 100 per day plus prepaid flights and hotels.
financial_thresholds_2026.warning: Sudden large deposits or 'parked' money will lead to visa refusal under 'justification for stay' grounds.

geospatial_submission_data.center: VFS Global Dhaka (Italy, Germany, France, etc.)
geospatial_submission_data.address: Delta Life Tower, Plot 37, Road 90, Gulshan 2, Dhaka-1212
Sleek Tower, Plot 3, Road 113/A, Gulshan 2, Dhaka-1212

itinerary_design_strategy.regional_focus: Italy (Rome, Florence, Venice) or Switzerland (Lucerne, Interlaken)
itinerary_design_strategy.requirements: The application must be submitted to the country where you stay the longest.

medium_risk: Applying to a country that is not the main destination
rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation: Provide property documents, family ties, and a very detailed day-by-day travel plan.

expert_approval_hacks: Submit your 'Wealth Statement' to prove significant local assets.
Ensure your Travel Insurance covers the 'repatriation' clause specifically.
If visiting multiple countries, keep the most nights in the country of application.
Use a professional translation service for all Bengali documents; avoid self-translation.

additional_logistics_2026.visit_japan_web: N/A - Europe uses EES (Entry/Exit System) and ETIAS for biometric tracking at borders.
additional_logistics_2026.currency_advice: Carry EUR 500 in cash; use Travel Cards or Multi-currency cards for larger payments.
additional_logistics_2026.jr_pass_note: Eurail Pass is the best option for multi-country travel; book 'Global Pass' before departure.

faq_extended.question: Can I travel to all of Europe with one visa?
faq_extended.answer: Yes, a Schengen visa allows you to travel to all 29 member states without internal border checks.

faq_extended.question: Is an interview mandatory for a Europe visa?
faq_extended.answer: Usually, biometrics are enough. However, the Embassy reserves the right to call any applicant for a physical interview.

faq_extended.question: What is the 90/180 rule?
faq_extended.answer: You can stay in the Schengen area for a maximum of 90 days within any rolling period of 180 days.

france.title: Comprehensive France Tourist (Schengen) Visa Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Citizens
france.description: The definitive 2026 guide for France Schengen visa applications in Bangladesh. Covering France-Visas portal registration, VFS Global submission protocols, mandatory biometric enrollment, and updated 2026 financial standards.

processing_time_metrics.peak_season_delay: 30-45 working days (During Summer Olympics/Paralympics legacy travel & Spring seasons)
processing_time_metrics.embassy_review_phase: Minimum 10 working days after VFS submission
processing_time_metrics.express_service: Unavailable (France strictly follows a merit-based chronological review)
processing_time_metrics.notes: Applications can be submitted up to 6 months before the travel date. Early booking is essential as VFS appointments fill up fast.

visa_fee_structure_2026.payment_policy: VFS service fee must be paid online to confirm the appointment. Embassy fees are paid in cash or card at the VFS center in BDT.

stay_and_validity_rules.standard_stay: Up to 90 days within a 180-day window
stay_and_validity_rules.extended_stay: Not permitted for tourism; requires a Long-Stay National Visa (Type D)
stay_and_validity_rules.visa_validity_window: Varies from 3 months up to 5 years (for frequent travelers)
stay_and_validity_rules.overstay_penalty: Fines, immediate deportation, and a minimum 5-year ban from all Schengen states
stay_and_validity_rules.extension_possibility: Extremely rare; only for serious medical emergencies or humanitarian reasons.

technical_photo_specifications.background_color: Plain Light Grey or Off-White (True white can cause glare)
technical_photo_specifications.print_quality: High resolution, matte or semi-matte paper (600dpi+)
technical_photo_specifications.facial_metrics: Face must cover 70-80% of the photo (32mm to 36mm from chin to crown)
strict_donots: No hair covering eyebrows or eyes
No smiling (must be a neutral expression with mouth closed)
No glasses with thick frames or tinted lenses
No religious headgear unless the full face is visible from chin to forehead

primary_documents: Original Passport (Valid for 6+ months, 2+ blank pages)
France-Visas Application Form (Dated and signed)
France-Visas Registration Receipt (Checklist provided by portal)
Cover Letter (Stating purpose of visit, duration, and funding details)
Original NOC from employer or Trade License (English + Notary)
Round-trip Flight Reservation (Confirmed PNR)
Hotel Booking (Confirmations for all nights in the Schengen area)
financial_proofs: Personal Bank Statement (Last 6 months, original with bank seal)
Bank Solvency Certificate
ITDR (Income Tax Deposit Receipt) / Tax Returns (Last 3 years)
Wealth Statement (If applicable, to prove local ties)
logistics_proofs: Travel Health Insurance (Minimum EUR 30,000 coverage, including repatriation)
Internal travel proof (Eurostar/TGV bookings if visiting multiple French cities)
Old Passports (Mandatory for travel history evaluation)

financial_thresholds_2026.logic: Calculated at ~EUR 120/day for non-sponsored travelers (or EUR 65/day with pre-paid hotels).
financial_thresholds_2026.warning: Lump-sum deposits right before applying are considered 'loaned funds' and lead to rejection.

geospatial_submission_data.address: Rangs Z square, Level 7, 118, Gulshan Avenue, Gulshan 2, Dhaka-1212

itinerary_design_strategy.golden_route: Paris -> Versailles -> Mont Saint-Michel -> Nice -> Cannes
itinerary_design_strategy.requirements: France must be your point of longest stay. If stays are equal, it must be your first point of entry.

high_risk: Lack of strong ties to Bangladesh
medium_risk: No previous travel outside of Asia
Vague daily plan in the cover letter
rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation: Provide evidence of fixed assets (Land/Property) and a very specific itinerary for Paris and the French Riviera.

expert_approval_hacks: Submit a copy of your Marriage Certificate to prove strong family ties.
Ensure your Travel Insurance covers the entire Schengen zone, not just France.
If staying with a friend/relative, the 'Attestation d’accueil' must be the original from the local French City Hall.
Write your cover letter in a formal 'SOP' style, emphasizing why France is your specific choice.

additional_logistics_2026.visit_japan_web: N/A - France uses the EES (Entry/Exit System) for biometric tracking and Arrive-FR declarations.
additional_logistics_2026.currency_advice: Carry EUR 500 in cash; use contact-less cards for metros and bistros.
additional_logistics_2026.jr_pass_note: TGV InOui is the best high-speed rail; book 'Carte Avantage' online for discounts.

faq_extended.question: Can I visit other countries like Switzerland with a French Visa?
faq_extended.answer: Yes, once you enter France, you can travel freely across all 29 Schengen states.

faq_extended.question: Do I need to speak French for the visa process?
faq_extended.answer: No. All documentation and the VFS process are conducted in English or Bengali.

faq_extended.question: Is insurance mandatory for all ages?
faq_extended.answer: Yes, medical insurance is mandatory for every applicant, including infants and senior citizens.

serbia.title: Comprehensive Serbia Tourist Visa Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Citizens
serbia.description: The definitive 2026 guide for Serbia visa applications in Bangladesh. Covering the e-Visa portal submission, mandatory Invitation Letter (Voucher) requirements, financial solvency standards, and Balkan transit protocols.

processing_time_metrics.peak_season_delay: 25-30 working days (During Summer and EXIT Festival season)
processing_time_metrics.embassy_review_phase: Minimum 14 working days after application receipt
processing_time_metrics.express_service: Unavailable (Decisions are made by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs in Belgrade)
processing_time_metrics.notes: Applications must be lodged at least three weeks prior to the intended travel date. Processing times exclude public holidays in both Serbia and Bangladesh.

visa_fee_structure_2026.embassy_visa_fee: EUR 90 (Approx. BDT 11,500 - 12,000 based on exchange rates)
visa_fee_structure_2026.vfs_service_charge: N/A (Primary submission is via e-Visa portal or Honorary Consulate)
visa_fee_structure_2026.payment_policy: Non-refundable. Fees are usually paid via International Credit/Debit card through the e-Visa portal or as specified by the consular section.

stay_and_validity_rules.standard_stay: Up to 90 days within a 180-day period
stay_and_validity_rules.extended_stay: Requires conversion to a Type D Long-Stay visa for work or study
stay_and_validity_rules.visa_validity_window: Typically issued for the duration of the travel voucher
stay_and_validity_rules.overstay_penalty: Fines, immediate deportation, and potential entry ban for the entire Balkan region
stay_and_validity_rules.extension_possibility: Generally not allowed for tourists unless for medical emergencies.

technical_photo_specifications.print_quality: High resolution (600dpi), no glares or ink smudges
technical_photo_specifications.facial_metrics: Face must cover 70-80% of the photo; head height ~34mm
strict_donots: No uniforms or white clothing
No smiling (neutral expression only)
No hair covering ears or forehead
No staples; photos must be uploaded digitally in high quality

primary_documents: Original Passport (Valid for 90 days after intended departure, 2+ blank pages)
Completed e-Visa Application Form (via eforeigner.welcometoserbia.gov.rs)
Travel Voucher/Proof of Payment for the trip (Issued by a Serbian travel agency)
Invitation Letter (For private visits, must be certified by relevant Serbian authority)
Cover Letter detailing the full travel itinerary
Proof of Employment (NOC or Trade License with English Translation)
Round-trip Flight Reservation (Confirmed PNR)
Proof of Accommodation (Matching the travel voucher)
financial_proofs: Personal Bank Statement (Last 6 months, showing regular income)
Bank Solvency Certificate
Proof of sufficient funds (Minimum EUR 50 per day of stay)
Income Tax Return (ITR) for the last 3 years
logistics_proofs: Travel Health Insurance (Minimum coverage EUR 30,000)
Detailed Day-by-Day Itinerary
Copies of previous visas (Schengen, UK, or USA visas significantly boost chances)

entrepreneurs: Trade License with English Translation & Notary

financial_thresholds_2026.logic: Calculated at ~EUR 50 per day plus flight and hotel prepayments.
financial_thresholds_2026.warning: Lump-sum deposits without clear source of income will result in visa refusal.

geospatial_submission_data.address: https://eforeigner.welcometoserbia.gov.rs
House # 27, Road # 5, Nikunja # 1, Khilkhet, Dhaka-1229

itinerary_design_strategy.regional_focus: Tara National Park or Đerdap Gorge
itinerary_design_strategy.requirements: Every night must be accounted for in the travel agency voucher or certified invitation.

rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation: Ensure the Invitation Letter is officially verified by the Serbian municipal authorities.

expert_approval_hacks: Obtain a certified voucher from a registered Serbian tour operator to act as a 'guarantee'.
Mention any valid Schengen or US visas; Serbia often allows entry without a separate visa for holders of these.
Register with the local police (White Card) within 24 hours of arrival—this is mandatory.
Keep at least 30% more funds in your account than the estimated cost of the trip.

additional_logistics_2026.visit_japan_web: N/A - Serbia requires a 'White Card' registration at the local police station upon arrival.
additional_logistics_2026.currency_advice: Local currency is Serbian Dinar (RSD). Euros are widely accepted for exchange.
additional_logistics_2026.jr_pass_note: No rail pass; travel between Belgrade and Novi Sad is best via the 'Soko' high-speed train.

faq_extended.question: Can I enter Serbia with a Schengen Visa?
faq_extended.answer: Yes, holders of valid multiple-entry Schengen, US, or UK visas can usually enter Serbia for up to 90 days without a separate Serbian visa.

faq_extended.question: Is the 'White Card' mandatory?
faq_extended.answer: Yes. If you stay in a hotel, they do it for you. If staying in a private apartment, you must visit the police station within 24 hours.

faq_extended.question: Does Serbia require a physical interview?
faq_extended.answer: Usually no for the e-Visa, but the Consulate in Dhaka or the Embassy in New Delhi may request one in specific cases.

australia.title: Comprehensive Australia Visitor Visa (Subclass 600) Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Citizens
australia.description: The definitive 2026 guide for Australia Visitor visa applications. Covering ImmiAccount online lodgement, biometric collection at VFS Global, GTE (Genuine Temporary Entrant) requirements, and financial solvency standards for Bangladeshi nationals.

processing_time_metrics.peak_season_delay: 45-60 working days (During December-January and July-August school holidays)
processing_time_metrics.embassy_review_phase: Minimum 20 working days after biometric enrollment
processing_time_metrics.express_service: Unavailable (Processing is chronological; however, CAN+ priority exists for certain frequent travelers)
processing_time_metrics.notes: Processing times fluctuate based on application volume and the complexity of background checks. Biometric delays will extend these timelines.

visa_fee_structure_2026.embassy_visa_fee: AUD 195 (Approx. BDT 17,000 - 18,500 based on exchange rates)
visa_fee_structure_2026.payment_policy: Visa fees must be paid online via ImmiAccount using an International Credit/Debit card. VFS service fees are paid locally in BDT.

stay_and_validity_rules.standard_stay: Up to 3, 6, or 12 months (As granted by the department)
stay_and_validity_rules.extended_stay: Requires applying for a new visa or a visa extension within Australia if no 'No Further Stay' condition is applied
stay_and_validity_rules.visa_validity_window: Usually granted for 1 year with multiple entries
stay_and_validity_rules.overstay_penalty: Immediate visa cancellation, 3-year re-entry ban (Condition 8503), and potential detention
stay_and_validity_rules.extension_possibility: Must be applied for at least 2 weeks before the current visa expires.

technical_photo_specifications.standard: Australian Department of Home Affairs Digital Standard
technical_photo_specifications.facial_metrics: Face must occupy 70-80% of the frame (32mm to 36mm from chin to crown)
strict_donots: No glasses (unless for medical reasons with a certificate)
No smiling or exaggerated expressions
No hair covering any part of the face
No digital retouching or filters

primary_documents: Original Passport (Valid for 6+ months, copy of all pages with stamps/visas)
Completed Online Application via ImmiAccount
National ID Card (NID) copy with English translation
Family Information Form (Details of all immediate family members)
Cover Letter/Statement of Purpose (Detailing planned activities and return intent)
Detailed Day-by-Day Itinerary
Employment Evidence (NOC or Trade License with Notary)
Evidence of enrollment (For students)
financial_proofs: Personal Bank Statement (Last 6 months, original with bank seal)
Bank Solvency Certificate
Pay Slips (Last 3-6 months)
Income Tax Return (ITR) certificates for the last 3 years
Credit Card statements (Optional, to show additional liquidity)
logistics_proofs: Hotel Bookings or Invitation Letter (If staying with family/friends)
Proof of Host's Status (Passport copy or Citizenship certificate of inviter)
Health Insurance (Recommended for stays over 3 months or for applicants over 75)

financial_thresholds_2026.logic: Calculated to cover airfare (~BDT 150k), accommodation, and ~AUD 200 daily living costs.
financial_thresholds_2026.warning: Sudden large deposits without verifiable history are the primary reason for 'Lack of Genuine Visitor' refusals.

geospatial_submission_data.center: VFS Global Australian Biometric Collection Centre (Dhaka)
geospatial_submission_data.address: Delta Life Tower (4th Floor), Plot # 37, Road # 90, Gulshan North, Dhaka-1212
geospatial_submission_data.passport_collection: N/A (Visa is electronic; decision via email)

geospatial_submission_data.center: VFS Global Australian Biometric Collection Centre (Sylhet)
geospatial_submission_data.address: 4th Floor, Nirvana Inn, Mirza Jungle Road, Ramer Digir Par, Sylhet-3100

itinerary_design_strategy.golden_route: Sydney (Opera House) -> Melbourne (Great Ocean Road) -> Gold Coast
itinerary_design_strategy.regional_focus: Great Barrier Reef (Cairns) or Perth (Western Australia)
itinerary_design_strategy.requirements: Itinerary must match the financial capacity shown in the bank statements.

high_risk: Lack of strong employment/economic ties to Bangladesh
medium_risk: Insufficient funds for the proposed duration
Inconsistent information in the Family Form
rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation: Include property deeds, family certificates, and a letter from your employer guaranteeing your job upon return.

expert_approval_hacks: Upload a 'Genuine Temporary Entrant' (GTE) statement specifically addressing why you must return to Bangladesh.
If you have a US or UK visa, highlight this in your application for faster processing.
Ensure all translated documents are done by a 'Certified Translator'—Home Affairs is strict on this.
Include photos of your family and property in Bangladesh to demonstrate 'Incentive to Return'.

additional_logistics_2026.visit_japan_web: N/A - Australia uses the 'Digital Passenger Declaration' (DPD) if required for health/security.
additional_logistics_2026.currency_advice: Australian Dollar (AUD). Credit cards are used for almost 95% of transactions (Contactless is standard).
additional_logistics_2026.jr_pass_note: No national rail pass equivalent; domestic flights (Qantas/Jetstar) are the primary mode of inter-city travel.

faq_extended.question: Is Australia a paper visa or a sticker?
faq_extended.answer: Australia issues 100% electronic visas (e-Visas). There is no sticker or stamp in your passport; the visa is linked to your passport number.

faq_extended.question: Do I need a medical exam for a tourist visa?
faq_extended.answer: Generally only if you are over 75, plan to stay more than 6 months, or will enter a hospital/healthcare environment.

faq_extended.question: What is the 'No Further Stay' condition?
faq_extended.answer: Condition 8503 means you cannot apply for most other visas while you are in Australia; you must leave before applying for another.

china.title: Comprehensive China Tourist (L) Visa Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Citizens
china.description: The definitive 2026 guide for China Tourist (L) visa applications in Bangladesh. Covering the COVA (China Online Visa Application) system, tiered fee structures based on travel history, and mandatory biometric/interview protocols at the Dhaka CVASC.

visa_category_details.visa_type: Sticker Visa (Single, Double, or Multiple Entry)

processing_time_metrics.peak_season_delay: 10-15 working days (During Canton Fair and Spring Festival periods)
processing_time_metrics.embassy_review_phase: Minimum 4 working days for express; 6-8 days for regular after CVASC submission
processing_time_metrics.express_service: Available (4th working day collection if submitted before 12:00 PM)
processing_time_metrics.notes: Processing starts only after the 'Passport to be submitted' status appears on the COVA portal. Blackout dates apply during Chinese public holidays.

visa_fee_structure_2026.vfs_service_charge: BDT 3,500 - 5,000 (Charged by the Visa Application Service Center)
visa_fee_structure_2026.payment_policy: Paid in cash or bank draft at the Visa Center (CVASC) at the time of submission. Fees are non-refundable.

stay_and_validity_rules.extended_stay: Requires application at the Exit and Entry Administration of Public Security Bureau (PSB) in China
stay_and_validity_rules.visa_validity_window: 90 days (Single Entry) up to 2 years (Multiple Entry)
stay_and_validity_rules.overstay_penalty: Fines of RMB 500 per day, detention, and potential deportation/blacklisting
stay_and_validity_rules.extension_possibility: Must be applied for 7 days before the current stay expires.

technical_photo_specifications.print_quality: High resolution, lab-print on glossy paper (not matte)
technical_photo_specifications.facial_metrics: Face width 15-22mm; head height 28-33mm; face must cover 70-80% of the frame
strict_donots: Ears must be fully visible (Mandatory requirement)
No glasses (even if prescription) unless for medical reasons with proof
No smiling (neutral expression with mouth closed)
No white clothing (must contrast with the white background)

primary_documents: Original Passport (Valid for 6+ months, 2+ blank pages)
Completed COVA Online Form (Printed and signed)
Confirmation of Online Visa Application (AVAS confirmation page)
Cover Letter signed by the applicant detailing travel purpose
Confirmed Air Ticket (Round trip)
Hotel Booking Confirmation
TIN Certificate and Last Year's Tax Return
financial_proofs: Personal Bank Statement (Last 6 months, original with seal)
Bank Solvency Certificate (Original copy)
Minimum Balance: BDT 300,000 per person
Business Bank Statement (For entrepreneurs)
logistics_proofs: Detailed Day-by-Day Travel Itinerary
Trade License (For business owners - Translated and Notarized)
NOC / Office ID / Salary Slips (For employees)
Nikah Nama / Marriage Certificate (If traveling with spouse - Notarized)

entrepreneurs: Trade License with QR Code (English + Notary)

financial_thresholds_2026.logic: Based on a minimum daily requirement of USD 100-150 plus flight/hotel coverage.
financial_thresholds_2026.warning: Sudden large deposits or accounts with no transaction history carry a high risk of rejection.

geospatial_submission_data.center: Chinese Visa Application Service Center (CVASC) Dhaka
geospatial_submission_data.address: 3rd Floor, Praasad Trade Center, 6 Kemal Ataturk Avenue, Banani, Dhaka-1213

geospatial_submission_data.center: Embassy of the P.R. China (For Interviews)
geospatial_submission_data.address: Plot 2 & 4, Embassy Road, Baridhara, Dhaka-1212

itinerary_design_strategy.golden_route: Beijing (Great Wall) -> Shanghai (The Bund) -> Xi'an (Terracotta Army)
itinerary_design_strategy.requirements: Itinerary must be consistent with the hotel bookings and flight dates.

high_risk: Fresh passport with no travel history (Interview Mandatory)
medium_risk: Insufficient bank balance for the number of travelers
rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation: Ensure your photo is lab-printed and your bank statement shows a consistent 6-month history.

expert_approval_hacks: Ensure ears and eyebrows are completely visible in the photo to avoid instant rejection at the counter.
If you have a fresh passport, be prepared for a 5-minute interview regarding your profession.
Mention previous travel to China or G7 countries (USA, UK, etc.) to waive the interview for Single Entry.
The 'Visa for China' portal status must say 'Passport to be submitted' before you visit the center.

additional_logistics_2026.visit_japan_web: N/A - China uses the 'China Customs' health/entry declaration QR code via WeChat or a web link.
additional_logistics_2026.currency_advice: Local currency is Chinese Yuan (RMB/CNY). Alipay and WeChat Pay are essential; cash is rarely used.
additional_logistics_2026.jr_pass_note: No rail pass; book High-Speed Rail (HSR) tickets via 12306 or Trip.com 15 days in advance.

faq_extended.question: Is an interview mandatory for China?
faq_extended.answer: Yes for fresh passports or those with limited travel history. It is usually waived for frequent travelers to China or OECD countries.

faq_extended.question: Can I apply for a 2-year multiple entry visa?
faq_extended.answer: Yes, provided you have already held a Multiple Entry Chinese visa after the year 2022.

faq_extended.question: Does China allow dual citizenship entry?
faq_extended.answer: China does not recognize dual nationality for Chinese citizens, but for Bangladeshis, it simply requires your NID/Passport declaration.

india.title: Comprehensive India Tourist Visa Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Citizens
india.description: The definitive 2026 guide for Indian visa applications in Bangladesh. Covering IVAC online form submission, port-specific annotations, financial solvency requirements, and the extensive network of submission centers across Bangladesh.

processing_time_metrics.peak_season_delay: 20-25 working days (During Eid holidays, Puja, and Winter peaks)
processing_time_metrics.embassy_review_phase: Minimum 5 working days after IVAC submission
processing_time_metrics.express_service: Medical visas prioritized; standard tourism follows chronological processing
processing_time_metrics.notes: Processing times are subject to the specific IVAC branch and current workload. e-Visa is NOT available for Bangladeshi passport holders.

visa_fee_structure_2026.embassy_visa_fee: Gratis (No visa fee for Bangladeshi citizens for most categories)
visa_fee_structure_2026.payment_policy: IVAC fees must be paid through authorized channels (BKash, Rocket, or designated banks) before the appointment.

stay_and_validity_rules.extended_stay: Requires registration with FRRO (Foreigners Regional Registration Office) in India
stay_and_validity_rules.overstay_penalty: Significant fines, potential detention, and difficulty in obtaining future Indian visas
stay_and_validity_rules.extension_possibility: Rare for tourists; usually only for medical emergencies.

technical_photo_specifications.print_quality: High-quality matte or glossy print, no staples or ink marks
technical_photo_specifications.facial_metrics: Face must occupy 70-80% of the frame; head height 25mm to 35mm
strict_donots: No white clothing (Must contrast with the white background)
Ears and eyebrows must be clearly visible
No shadows on the face or background
No glasses or headgear except for religious purposes

primary_documents: Original Passport (Valid for 6+ months, 2+ blank pages)
Completed Online Form (indianvisaonline.gov.in) with signature
Copy of National ID Card (NID) or Birth Certificate (English)
Utility Bill Copy (Electricity/Gas/Water) not older than 3 months
All previous passports must be submitted
Proof of Profession (NOC or Trade License with Notary)
financial_proofs: Personal Bank Statement (Last 6 months, minimum balance BDT 20,000/person)
Bank Solvency Certificate (Original with bank seal)
Endorsement of USD 200 per person on passport (Alternative to bank statement)
logistics_proofs: Travel Route details (Entry and Exit ports must be specified)
Invitation Letter (For private visits) or Hotel Booking (For tourism)
Flight or Train reservations (Optional but recommended for air/rail entry)

entrepreneurs: Trade License with English Translation & Notary
government_officials: Government Order (GO) or NOC from the Ministry

financial_thresholds_2026.logic: Minimum balance requirement is low, but consistent transaction history is vital.
financial_thresholds_2026.warning: Ensure the address on your utility bill matches the address on your visa application exactly.

geospatial_submission_data.address: Floor-G1, South Court, Jamuna Future Park, Progoti Sharani, Dhaka
211, Gangchil, Kandirpar, Nazrul Avenue, 1st Floor, Cumilla
1872, CDA Avenue, East Nasirabad, City Center, 2nd Floor, Chattogram

itinerary_design_strategy.requirements: Port of entry (e.g., Benapole, Gede, or Air) must be chosen carefully during the application.

high_risk: Address mismatch between NID and Utility bill
rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation: Double-check that the name spelling on all documents (NID, Passport, Bank, Utility) is identical.

expert_approval_hacks: Select 'By Road - Haridaspur' (Benapole) if you want the most flexible land entry option.
Ensure your photo is a recent 2x2 inch square—standard passport size photos are often rejected.
A valid utility bill is the most critical document for proving your current residence.
Keep a gap of 2 months between visits if you have already stayed for a long duration on a previous visa.

additional_logistics_2026.visit_japan_web: N/A - India uses the 'Air Suvidha' or similar health portals only during active health mandates.
additional_logistics_2026.currency_advice: Indian Rupee (INR). Carry BDT to exchange at the border or use International Travel Cards.
additional_logistics_2026.jr_pass_note: Indian Railways (IRCTC) is the lifeline; use 'Foreign Tourist Quota' for easier seat availability.

faq_extended.question: Can I get an Indian e-Visa?
faq_extended.answer: No, Bangladeshi citizens are currently ineligible for e-Visas. You must apply through an IVAC center.

faq_extended.question: Can I change my port of entry later?
faq_extended.answer: You can usually enter through any of the 24 international airports and 3 specific sea ports regardless of the port on your visa, but land borders are strict.

faq_extended.question: How long is the 2-month gap rule?
faq_extended.answer: The mandatory 2-month gap between visits has been largely relaxed for tourists, but check the 'Endorsement' on your specific visa sticker.

armenia.title: Comprehensive Armenia Tourist Visa Guide 2026 for Bangladeshi Citizens
armenia.description: The definitive 2026 guide for Armenia visa applications for Bangladeshi nationals. Note that Bangladesh is currently on the 'Invitation-Only' list, requiring a verified host or agency in Armenia before applying for a sticker visa at the embassy.

visa_category_details.visa_type: Sticker Visa (e-Visa only available for Bangladeshi holders of valid US/UK/Schengen/GCC residence permits until July 2026)

processing_time_metrics.peak_season_delay: 25-35 working days (Summer and New Year peaks)
processing_time_metrics.embassy_review_phase: 10 working days after invitation approval and passport submission
processing_time_metrics.express_service: Not officially available for invitation-based categories
processing_time_metrics.notes: The primary delay is the approval of the Invitation Letter by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs/Police in Armenia, which can take 2-4 weeks.

visa_fee_structure_2026.vfs_service_charge: N/A (Submissions are typically direct or via authorized agents to New Delhi)

optional_value_added_services.invitation_processing_fee: AMD 5,000 (Paid in Armenia by the host)

visa_fee_structure_2026.payment_policy: Consular fees are paid online via the Armenian MFA portal or bank transfer as directed by the Embassy in New Delhi.

stay_and_validity_rules.standard_stay: Up to 21 or 120 days (Based on visa type granted)
stay_and_validity_rules.extended_stay: Can be extended for 60 days at the Migration and Citizenship Service in Yerevan
stay_and_validity_rules.visa_validity_window: Usually 90 days from the date of issue
stay_and_validity_rules.overstay_penalty: Fines starting from AMD 50,000 and potential deportation

technical_photo_specifications.print_quality: High resolution, matte finish, no ink marks
technical_photo_specifications.facial_metrics: Face must cover 70-80% of the area
strict_donots: No glasses (unless medically necessary)
No smiling (neutral expression)
No white clothing
No hair covering the face or eyes

primary_documents: Original Passport (Valid for 6 months beyond stay)
Approved Invitation Letter (Verified by MFA/Police in Armenia)
Completed and Signed Visa Application Form
Cover Letter detailing travel purpose and duration
NOC from Employer or Trade License (Translated & Notarized)
Round-trip Flight Reservation
Hotel Booking Confirmation (Must match invitation details)
financial_proofs: Personal Bank Statement (Last 6 months, original seal)
Bank Solvency Certificate
Minimum balance recommendation: BDT 400,000+
Income Tax Returns (Last 3 years)
logistics_proofs: Mandatory Travel Insurance (Minimum EUR 30,000 coverage)
Civil status documents (If traveling as a family)
Copy of valid/expired visas of other countries (USA, UK, Schengen)

financial_thresholds_2026.logic: Requires proof of daily funds (~USD 50/day) plus return airfare and accommodation.
financial_thresholds_2026.warning: Unexplained large deposits will lead to suspicion regarding 'Genuine Visitor' status.

geospatial_submission_data.center: Embassy of Armenia in New Delhi (Nearest for Bangladeshis)
geospatial_submission_data.address: D-133, Anand Niketan, New Delhi, Delhi 110021, India
https://evisa.mfa.am

itinerary_design_strategy.regional_focus: Dilijan (Little Switzerland) or Tatev Monastery (Longest Cable Car)
itinerary_design_strategy.requirements: The invitation letter from the Armenian host must explicitly list these destinations.

rejection_risk_matrix.mitigation: Ensure your host in Armenia submits the invitation through the 'e-request.am' portal for verification.

expert_approval_hacks: Special 2026 Rule: If you have a UAE/GCC Residence Permit, you can apply for an e-Visa or entry until July 1st, 2026.
Always include a copy of your Trade License or NOC even for personal visits.
Ensure the invitation is printed on a registered Armenian company's letterhead if traveling for business.
Travel insurance must specifically mention 'Republic of Armenia' or 'Global' coverage.

additional_logistics_2026.visit_japan_web: N/A - Armenia requires a standard customs declaration for currency over USD 10,000.
additional_logistics_2026.currency_advice: Local currency is Armenian Dram (AMD). USD/EUR are easily exchanged in Yerevan.
additional_logistics_2026.jr_pass_note: No rail pass; inter-city travel is best by 'Marshrutka' (minibuses) or Yandex Taxi.

faq_extended.question: Can I get a visa on arrival in Armenia?
faq_extended.answer: No. Bangladeshi citizens must obtain a visa in advance via the Embassy or e-Visa (if holding qualifying permits).

faq_extended.question: Do I need to go to New Delhi for the interview?
faq_extended.answer: Usually, documents can be sent via an authorized agent, but the Embassy reserves the right to call for a physical interview.

faq_extended.question: Is Armenia part of the Schengen area?
faq_extended.answer: No. Armenia is an independent country; a Schengen visa does not grant entry unless specifically used as a basis for their 2026 exemption rule.
